servers.name: filesystem
servers.purpose: Read and write repo artifacts, templates, and staged captures.

servers.name: git
servers.purpose: Inspect history, diffs, and provenance of schema and loader changes.

servers.name: web-research
servers.purpose: Search the web and retrieve candidate pages during exploration runs.

servers.name: document-parser
servers.purpose: Extract content from HTML, PDF, CSV, and other source artifacts.

servers.name: raw-store
servers.purpose: Persist immutable raw capture artifacts for audit and debugging.

servers.name: schema-validator
servers.purpose: Validate context packs, memory, raw captures, and normalized claims.

servers.name: postgres
servers.purpose: Load validated normalized claims into the production relational store.

servers.name: observability
servers.purpose: Capture run logs, metrics, and failure traces for the pipeline.

servers.name: scheduler
servers.purpose: Coordinate batch exploration and retry runs when the pipeline scales.
